reasoning: C had the most genuinely distinct set: it broke a different axis each time — direction of assessment (Reciprocal Card grades the school back), medium (Artifact Reliquary is a physical box with no paper and a voice memo), and absence itself (Negative Space Map reports only what was deliberately NOT taught) — escaping the document-form entirely twice. B is close and craftier per-line, with the strongest single ideas (Forward Contract written only in future tense, Hundred-Year Card for a reader who does not exist yet), but its Logbook and Failure Dossier both cluster around child-authored process narrative. A is well-built and humane, but stays mostly within the booklet/ledger frame and its Question Museum and Friction Map sit adjacent to its other entries, giving it the least internal spread.
